name: mtrense-skills
description: Workflow-family plugins for Claude Code: milestone-driven build, research knowledge bases, codebase surveys, and shared utilities.

plugins.name: milestone-driven

plugins.name: research
plugins.description: Multi-phase research workflow for building cited, audited knowledge bases.

plugins.name: codebase-survey
plugins.description: Bootstraps and maintains an AI-consumable map of an existing codebase with per-module CODEBASE.md and derived CLAUDE.md rules.
